description_long: This flower shop consists of three adjacent small commercial buildings, with the central structure clearly labeled as a flower shop. The central building features a gabled roof, a large pink sign reading 'Flower shop', and a storefront with multiple potted plants and flowers displayed on shelves and stands. The left building has a blue-striped awning, a counter with flower arrangements, and a green mat, suggesting an outdoor market stall. The right building is smaller, with a vending machine and a sign above the entrance, possibly for refreshments or related goods. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood, with some metal and plastic elements for signage, awnings, and vending machines. The shop exudes a quaint, small-town commercial vibe, with clear areas for customer interaction and product display.
description: A charming flower shop with a central building featuring a pink sign, potted plants, and flanked by two smaller commercial stalls, one with a blue-striped awning and the other with a vending machine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flower shop's pink sign, potted plant displays, blue-striped awning on the left stall, and vending machine on the right stall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the central building, the sloped roofs, and the relative positions of the three structures.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain wooden backs of the three buildings, with minimal detail and no signage or displays.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the blue roof of the left stall, the side of the central building, and the arrangement of the three structures.
attribute_storefront_signage: The central building has a large pink rectangular sign with the text 'Flower shop' in white, placed above the entrance. The rightmost stall has a red sign with white and blue graphics above the vending machine. The left stall has a striped awning but no visible text signage.
attribute_displayed_flower_arrangements: There are at least six visible flower arrangements: four potted plants on shelves in front of the central shop, one arrangement on a small stand to the right, and one on the counter of the left stall. The arrangements feature a variety of colors, including pink, red, and green, and are displayed in an orderly, inviting manner.
attribute_window_displays: No distinct window displays are visible; the central shop has open shelves with potted plants instead of traditional window displays.
attribute_awning_with_floral_patterns: No floral-patterned awning is visible. The left stall has a blue-and-white striped awning with no floral motifs.
